sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93347" key="sarkogoni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαρκο-γονία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">γενέσθαι</etym>) <sense id="n93347.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">formation of flesh</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐξ αἵματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg004:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Antr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
